channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Trump offers no concrete plan as Strait of Hormuz closure shocks Europe
item.description: Economist James Meadway says US President Donald Trump offers threats but no clear plan to end the crisis.

item.title: Iran’s ex-FM Zarif proposes peace roadmap; Gulf points at erosion of trust
item.description: Zarif’s plan calls for limits on Iran’s nuclear programme and reopening Strait of Hormuz in return for end to sanctions.

item.title: Oman, Iran discuss smooth transit in Strait of Hormuz, Muscat says
item.description: The talks focus on a 'smooth passage' through the Strait of Hormuz, as Tehran effectively blocks the vital waterway.

item.title: “We blame Trump”: Drivers line up for free gas as prices surge in the US
item.description: Drivers lined up for free gas in Chicago as fuel prices surge, driven by the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: US pilot from downed F-15E plane rescued in Iran: What we know
item.description: The second pilot from the fighter jet shot down in Iran is rescued by US rescue forces after 48 hours.

item.title: Kuwait’s power, water plants damaged as Iran keeps attacking Gulf states
item.description: Bahrain and the UAE also report attacks resulting in fires, which are put out quickly.

item.title: Thousands rally in Iraq against ‘senseless’ US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Protesters chant against the US and Israel, urging the global community to confront their actions in the Middle East.

item.title: Trump seeks to end the war without it becoming ‘an abject failure’
item.description: Barbara Slavin of the Stimson Center says Trump misread the situation in Iran and now scrambles for a way out.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 37 of US-Israeli attacks?
item.description: A US crew member who has been missing since Iran shot down a fighter plane has been rescued, Trump says.

item.title: Yemen’s Houthis claim cluster missile attack on Israel’s Ben Gurion airport
item.description: Yemen’s Houthi military spokesman has claimed responsibility for a strike on Israel’s Ben Gurion airport in Jaffa.
